Actually earlier they mentioned "hydrate_source [F1]" and "expand_file [F1]" as recommended actions, where [F1] likely refers to a node id. So the node id for the file is F1. Thus tool_call: tool_name: "session.expand_file", payload: {"target_selector":"F1"}.
